summary: Iteration 22: Word Bank Edit & Privacy Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 19/19 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend: Admin Word Banks tab with category filters, edit modal, visibility badges all verified. Parent privacy enforcement working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/word-banks/{id} properly enforces ownership check for parents - only owner can edit
Parent-created word banks are forced to 'private' visibility regardless of request
Parents cannot change visibility from 'private' even when editing - stays enforced
Admin can edit any word bank including parent-created private banks
GET /api/word-banks correctly filters by role: parents see global + their own private banks only
Category filter query parameter works correctly in API

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 passed, 1 skipped - no global admin bank to test)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing 'My Family Words' private bank created by allen@ourfamily.contact
context_for_next_testing_agent: Word bank edit and privacy features fully working. The 'My Family Words' bank is private, created by allen@ourfamily.contact, and correctly not visible to other@test.com. Admin can see and edit all banks including private ones. Category filters (all/general/academic/professional/specialized) work in both backend API and frontend UI.

frontend_ui_tests: Admin Word Banks tab navigation - PASSED
Category filter buttons (All, General, Academic, Professional, Specialized) - ALL PRESENT
Academic filter shows 1 bank (Robotics & AI Fundamentals) - PASSED
Edit buttons on word bank cards - 9 found
Delete buttons on word bank cards - 9 found
Edit modal opens with pre-filled data (Aviation Essentials) - PASSED
Edit modal form fields: name, category, description, specialty, price, words - ALL PRE-FILLED
Parent (allen@ourfamily.contact) sees 'My Family Words' private bank - PASSED
Other parent (other@test.com) does NOT see 'My Family Words' - PASSED (privacy verified)

parent_edit_own_bank.can_edit_description: Parent can edit their own private bank - WORKING
parent_edit_own_bank.cannot_change_visibility: Visibility stays 'private' even if parent requests 'global' - WORKING
parent_edit_own_bank.cannot_edit_others_bank: Returns 403/404 for other parent's bank - WORKING

category_filter.ui_filter_buttons: All 5 category buttons present and functional - WORKING

privacy_enforcement.parent_create_forced_private: POST /api/word-banks by guardian forces visibility='private' - WORKING
privacy_enforcement.other_parent_no_access: other@test.com cannot see or edit 'My Family Words' - WORKING
privacy_enforcement.admin_sees_all: Admin sees all banks including private ones - WORKING

admin_frontend_wordbanks.edit_delete_buttons: Edit and Delete on each card
admin_frontend_wordbanks.edit_modal: Opens with pre-filled form, save/cancel buttons
